sp_widget.description: IDP Home Page widget — hero section, persona tiles, insights panel, AI assistant placeholder, and quick links. All data driven from server-side capability resolution.
sp_widget.name: IDP Home Page
sp_widget.template:
Welcome back, {{c.userName}}

{{c.personaLabel}} — Internal Developer Portal

{{action.label}}

Your Workspaces

{{tile.icon}}
{{tile.title}}
{{tile.desc}}

Platform Insights

Deployments (24h)
{{c.insights.deployments || 0}}
Active Incidents
{{c.insights.incidents || 0}}
Pending Approvals
{{c.insights.approvals || 0}}
Security Findings
{{c.insights.security_findings || 0}}
🤖 Ask Platform AI
Get instant answers about services, pipelines, and platform capabilities.
{{c.aiResponse}}

Quick Links

{{link.label}}
